---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Minimal reproducible example

```python
# paste the shortest script that triggers the bug
from handanim import ...
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full traceback if there is one.

```
paste traceback here
```

## Environment

- handanim version: <!-- `poetry version` or pip show handanim -->
- Python version: <!-- `python --version` -->
- OS: <!-- macOS / Ubuntu / Windows + version -->
- Cairo version: <!-- `brew info cairo` or `apt-cache show libcairo2` -->

## Additional context

Screenshots, rendered output, or anything else that helps reproduce the issue.
